title: Definitions of LGU and Manning Agency
content:
(x) LGU - Local Government Unit

(y) Manning Agency - refers to any person, partnership or corporation duly licensed by the Secretary of Labor and Employment to engage in the recruitment and placement of seafarers for ships plying international waters and for related maritime activities.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
